seo.title: Ma's Leg of Lamb - Marinda Kook

html:
Ingredients

  • 1 leg of lamb on the bone
  • 8 cloves garlic
  • 3 sprigs rosemary
  • 4 anchovies
  • salt and pepper
  • garlic bulb cut in half
  • a few small whole baby onions
  • 4 potatoes cut into quarters
  • 125 ml 'Old Brown Sherry'
  • 125 ml good meat stock

Method

Set the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.

Wash the leg and pat dry. Make small cuts in the leg and press in the garlic, rosemary and anchovy.

Salt and pepper the leg.

Put the leg and garlic bulb in an oven dish and pour the sherry and stock around the leg. Cover with foil and bake for one hour.

Open up and add the onions and potatoes. Bake uncovered until done and enjoy!

Easy!
